assessor_raw: Heart failure readmission prediction: methodologically sound. Temporal split with site and risk tier stratification. IHF cohort clearly defined with planned readmission exclusion verified by manual spot-check. GRU/transformer for irregular time series vs. L2-regularized logistic regression is a fair comparison. ROC-AUC appropriate for risk ranking. Decision curve analysis, calibration, and site-stratified AUC are comprehensive secondary metrics. Preprocessing fit-apply separation correct. Scope bounded to same institution. Verdict: defense_wins.
